_publications._publicationTitle: A platform for rapid patient-derived cutaneous neurofibroma organoid establishment and screening

_contextSnippet: These include copanlisib, a PI3K inhibitor; onalespib, an Hsp90 inhibitor; linsitinib, an IGF-1R inhibitor; and digoxin, an Na+/K+ ATPase inhibitor, which induced an average residual viability of ≤50% across all samples
details: Demonstrated drug screening capability with 43 targeted kinase inhibitors, identifying 4 compounds (copanlisib, onalespib, linsitinib, digoxin) that induced ≤50% residual viability across all samples
